title: Rich British Chicken Pie And Mash
description: A savory and creamy British dish featuring chicken, vegetables, and a cookie crust, served with mashed potatoes in a claypot.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the miso paste and olive oil to make a marinade.
Add the chicken to the marinade and toss to coat, then set aside for 30 minutes.
In a large skillet, saute the onion and carrots in butter until the vegetables are tender.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
In a separate pot, boil the potatoes until tender, then mash with heavy cream and chicken broth.
In a claypot, create a layer of cookie crumbs, then add the chicken and vegetable mixture, and finally a layer of mashed potatoes.
Bake the pie in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
